title: Review finding absorbed: archive invariant covers buffers
body: Shaded review finding absorbed. Sylvan amended knowledge-preservation-over-fitness-warnings Scope so preservation-over-fitness remains memory/state scoped, while archive-after-processing applies to every curation archive move including buffers such as pending-graduations.md. Focused markdownlint on the rule and git diff --check both pass. Next tiny curation move: route the Breezy-survey cron-template owner-input-precedence gap explicitly in pending-graduations, no archival or drain.
